title: Ducky Tweaks
description:
A resource pack made for PVP/Anarchy servers with duck aspects.
Credits: LSE0
body:
Ducky Tweaks is a resource pack made for PVP/Anarchy servers.
It changes the textures of the following:
  - Totem Of Undying
  - End Crystal
  - Enchant Glint
  - UI Elements
  - And more...
#  Credits: LSE0
